log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Half-Orc — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Half-Orc — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Half-Orc — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Half-Orc — Winged Striker HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Half-Orc — Winged Striker HP: 36/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Half-Orc — Winged Striker HP: 17/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Half-Orc — Winged Striker --- HP: 17/67 | AC: 14

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Half-Orc — Winged Striker --- HP: 34/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
